sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved') 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 7 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 14
)

SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved') 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 14 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30
)

SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved') 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
--and DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) >30
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` < (DATEADD(day,-30, currentDate())))
)

SELECT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Group Transfers` > 0) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
) Group by `HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS C2,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS C3
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` != Null THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
COUNT(1) AS numberofinc
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority))
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved')
and DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 7 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 14
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup
ORDER BY numberofinc desc
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Open Incidents by Assigned Group (> 7 days and <= 14 days )

WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company))

panels.title: Open Incidents by Assigned Group (> 14 days and <= 30 days)

SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS C2,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS C3

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` != Null THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
COUNT(1) AS numberofinc
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority))
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved')
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` < (DATEADD(day,-30, currentDate())))
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup
ORDER BY numberofinc desc
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Open Incidents by Assigned Group (> 30 days)

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
Select Age, avg(reassign_cnt) Cnt from (
SELECT
(CASE
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) >= 0 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 7 THEN '<=7 Days'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 7 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 14 THEN '> 7 Days'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 14 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '> 14 Days'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN '> 30 Days'
END) AS Age, count(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) as reassign_cnt
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Group Transfers` > 0) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
) group by Age) SQL1
group by Age

Select Age, Priority, Count(*) Cnt from (
SELECT
(CASE
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) >= 0 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 7 THEN '<=7 Days'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 7 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 14 THEN '> 7 days and <= 14 days'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 14 AND DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '> 14 Days and <= 30 days'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN '> 30 Days'
END) AS Age, Priority
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
 (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved')
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
)) SQL1
group by Age, Priority
order by Priority

panels.title: Count of Open Incidents by Aging and Priority
